name: TALENTLESS
author: hellohellohell0
description: The gold standard for Roblox piano autoplaying. Features a randomized note-release algorithm, adjustable error margin for human-like imperfections, MIDI spoofing in Piano Rooms, velocity and sustain pedal support, and the MIDI2LUA converter for custom songs. Ships with 500+ quality-arranged built-in tracks.
howToUse:
1. Get a key from the Linkvertise page on hellohellohell0.com/talentless
2. Paste the script into your executor and execute
3. Enter your key when prompted
4. Browse the built-in song list or use MIDI2LUA on their website to convert your own MIDI files
5. Adjust error margin for human-like playing, then hit Play
